settings.title: Access settings (EUIPO)
settings.description: For real data, enter your EUIPO API credentials. They are free from dev.euipo.europa.eu.

config.title: First, set up the app
config.text: The watchdog pulls data from the official EUIPO API. Enter your own EUIPO API credentials (free, ~5 min at dev.euipo.europa.eu) — searching the register is not possible without them.
config.hint: Keys are stored only in your space (~/.cdx) and used for EUIPO queries.

add.title: Watch a trademark
add.description: Enter a word mark, or upload a logo. The watchdog then monitors similar new trademark filings and registrations.
add.niceHint: Numbers 1–45, comma separated. Optional — narrows relevance.
add.logoHint: Click to upload a logo image (PNG, JPG, SVG).
add.label: Label (optional)

edit.title: Edit trademark
edit.description: Change the match threshold, classes, territories, owner or label of the watched mark.
edit.thresholdHint: Collisions show only above this threshold. Lower threshold = more (looser) matches.

detail.refreshError: The check could not be performed.
detail.noCollisionsHint: No similar trademark above the match threshold has been found yet.

empty.title: You are not watching any trademark yet
empty.text: Add a word or figurative mark and the watchdog will regularly check for similar new trademark filings and registrations.
empty.noSelection: Select a trademark from the list on the left.
empty.chatLead: Or set up monitoring in a conversation — try:
empty.chatPrompt: Watch the trademark CODEXIS in classes 9 and 42 in CZ and EU and e-mail me similar new filings weekly.
